provisions.title: Short title
provisions.content:
1. Short title
This Act may be cited as the Anthropological Research Act.

provisions.title: Interpretation
provisions.content:
2. Interpretation
In this Act—
"anthropological research" means investigation or research of a physical anthropological, social anthropological, cultural anthropological, sociological, physiological, group psychological, linguistic, ethnological, ethnographical, or ethno-historical nature and includes research into the human geography and human ecology of any area.

definitions.definition: investigation or research of a physical anthropological, social anthropological, cultural anthropological, sociological, physiological, group psychological, linguistic, ethnological, ethnographical, or ethno-historical nature and includes research into the human geography and human ecology of any area.
